card: Nit3stalkr — human in #bots-everywhere. Discord ID 476437650849529856. Has an LVDB clan tag. Smartwatch nerd — has owned a Galaxy Watch Ultra, Watch 6 Classic, and an older Samsung Gear (possibly Gear S3 from ~2019). Knows about strap mechanisms, bezel rotation, battery life. Chatty, friendly, replies with quoted messages.
